news.headline: Arsenal win Premier League title for first time since 2004

news.headline: Fakhar Zaman, Saim Ayub ruled out of upcoming ODI series against Australia
news.summary:
<p>Opening batters Fakhar Zaman and Saim Ayub have been ruled out of the  upcoming one-day international (ODI) series against Australia, scheduled to begin on May 30, the Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) said on Wednesday.</p>
